docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY SCHLICOFF, EDWARD D.B.A. ( E M S. PLUMBING ) AS TO DEFENDANT NEATHERY, GORDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE *(NO NAME LISTED FOR THE APARTMENT # 1/ NOT FOUND)* (SERVICE FEE $60.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHLICOFF, EDWARD D.B.A. ( E M S. PLUMBING ) AS TO DEFENDANT NEATHERY, GORDON
DECLARATION OF AMENDING THE AMOUNT OF CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHLICOFF, EDWARD D.B.A. ( E M S. PLUMBING )
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY SCHLICOFF, EDWARD D.B.A. ( E M S. PLUMBING ) AS TO DEFENDANT NEATHERY, GORDON
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-05-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-10-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED OCT-17-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NEATHERY, GORDON
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF REGARDING COURT HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHLICOFF, EDWARD D.B.A. ( E M S. PLUMBING )
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-10-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
